creator: yetoohappy@gmail.com
text: When I first viewed the link on Firefox android app I saw the discrepancy as described in the report, but it was gone upon refreshing. Now looking at the page in Firefox 91.5.0esr instead of the footer being FreeBSD 14.0 it's just BSD. When I switched the man page to 12.3 release from 13 the footer still said FreeBSD 13. When I selected Freebsd 11.3 RELEASE and Ports the footer displayed just BSD. There is an issue here and this needs to be reopened.
